---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new capability
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that the project doesn't support today?

## Proposed solution

What would you like to see? If it's a new source connector, enricher, output
endpoint, or a `SecretsPort` backend, say which.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've weighed, and why they fall short.

## Additional context

Anything else — links, examples, related issues.
